case_title: HENRY LEUNG VS. FOG CITY CAB et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT FOG CITY CAB BLAKE, GEORGE MO, MARK DOES 1 TO X, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-30-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-15-2011
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FOG CITY CAB BLAKE, GEORGE MO, MARK

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-05-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-01-2012 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 610. DEC-30-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAR-15-2012.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR RUSSELL SAMUEL ROECA.
ARBITRATOR RICHARD CRAIG WOOTTON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-16-2012 THROUGH JUN-14-2012.
REMOVED FROM THE PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-01-2012 - CASE SETTLED AT CONFERENCE. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON JUL-03-2012 AT 2:00 PM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEUNG, HENRY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-03-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF MAR-16-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
